Item Name: Wilderness Poets White Mulberries - Raw Organic Dried Mulberries, 8 oz (227 g)
Bullet Point 1: Wilderness Poets Dried White Mulberries - 8 oz pouch
Bullet Point 2: Ingredients: Organic Raw Sun-Dried White Mulberries
Bullet Point 3: USDA Certified Organic, Vegan, Raw, Gluten Free, Non-GMO, No Sugar or Salt, No Perservatives
Bullet Point 4: Superfood - Excellent source of Iron, Vitamin C, Calcium and Antioxidants - Featured on Dr. Oz
Bullet Point 5: Naturally Sweet: Add to granola, trail mix, oatmeal, baked goods, raw desserts etc
Product Description: Wilderness Poets Raw Organic White Mulberries. These raw, organic, sun-dried Mulberries are chewy and bursting with sweet nectar. They are delicious alone or used as a whole-food sweetener. Mulberries are an excellent source of iron, vitamin C, calcium, protein, and Resveratrol - a powerful antioxidant which is also found in red wine. Use in place of raisins: Blend into smoothies as a whole-food sweetener. Add to your own granola or trail mix. Stir into Nut Butter for a delicious Mulberry candy! Store in a cool dry place. Enjoy!
Value: 8.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic superfood positioned as a healthy, natural snack with multiple dietary certifications. Small pouch size suggests specialty pricing, while 'superfood' claims and Dr. Oz endorsement justify higher price point. Targets health-conscious consumers willing to pay for organic, non-GMO, and additive-free products.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Organix Renewing Moroccan Argan Penetrating Oil for Unisex, 3.3 Ounce
Bullet Point 1: PENETRATING ARGAN HAIR OIL: Our signature line, infused with Argan oil from Morocco, deeply hydrates & helps restore strength, shine, & softness. Smooth your locks to their silkiest potential.
Bullet Point 2: POWERFUL PROTECTION: This rich penetrating hair oil infused with Argan oil from Morocco helps restore essential moisture & shine to your locks! Great for curly, dry, transitioning, & natural hair.
Bullet Point 3: BEAUTY PURE & SIMPLE: OGX products are inspired by nature. We don’t try to make hair look “perfect” because we’d rather make hair look fuller, smoother, curlier, or bouncier & smell irresistible.
Bullet Point 4: WHAT HAIR WANTS: Whether you need quenching moisture for curly hair, protection for color treated hair, blowout cream or matte pomade, OGX hair care products are designed to bring out your best.
Bullet Point 5: REAL QUALITY, REAL BEAUTY: Unattainable looks don't inspire us but originality does. OGX hair & skin care product collections are here to help you look your best! We’re beauty, pure & simple.
Value: 3.3
Unit: ounce
overall_summary: Premium hair care product positioned as a luxury treatment with natural ingredients. The brand emphasizes purity and simplicity, targeting consumers seeking high-quality, nature-inspired hair care. The 3.3 fl oz size and premium packaging suggest a mid-to-high price point, justified by the use of Moroccan argan oil and the product's specialized benefits for hair strength and shine.

Bullet Point 2: JUST ADD WATER: It’s ideal for baking since it has a much longer shelf life than liquid coconut milk and does not require refrigeration.
Bullet Point 3: VEGAN, ORGANIC, AND NON-GMO PROJECT VERIFIED: Use in sauces, smoothies, desserts, and wherever you want to avoid dairy milk but still enjoy a rich, creamy taste.
Bullet Point 4: Because you are what you eat, NOW Real Food is committed to providing delicious, healthy, natural, and organic foods. Keep it natural. Keep it real.

Family-owned brand with a focus on natural and organic ingredients suggests a trusted, health-conscious product line.
